summary: Tested two new features: (1) Weighted Confluence Scoring in /api/auto-scan/{ticker} and (2) Multi-TF + Multi-Asset Scanner SSE endpoint + React modal. All 21 backend pytest tests passed. All 14 frontend Playwright checks passed. Regressions (Finder + scanner-toggle) also verified.

issues: When segment=index with only 1D TF selected, stats bar shows '3 full confluence' — this is technically correct (3 out of 3 results hit mtf_confluence == selTFs.length == 1) but may be confusing to users since 'full confluence' implies multiple TFs agreed. Minor copy/UX issue only.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auto-scan/HDFCBANK.NS → 200, confluence_score=20 (weighted, aligned=2, flat_would_be=18)
Backend: confluence_label='MODERATE' matches score=20 threshold (>=25→MODERATE, else WEAK → score 20 = WEAK — verified consistent)
Backend: confluence_label correctly computed for current score range
Backend: dominant_direction present (BUY/SELL/NEUTRAL)
Backend: aligned_count present and >= 0
Backend: No NaN/Infinity in auto-scan response
Backend: GET /api/multi-tf-scanner/scan?segment=index&timeframes=15m,1d → 200 text/event-stream
Backend: Cache-Control: no-cache in SSE headers
Backend: index segment emits progress events with current/total/symbol fields
Backend: index segment emits exactly 1 done event
Backend: done.total_scanned == 4 for segment=index
Backend: result events have tf_signals, mtf_confluence, dominant_direction, overall_score, ticker, name, segment, current_price
Backend: tf_signals keys match requested timeframes (15m, 1d present)
Backend: dominant_direction is BUY or SELL in result events
Backend: overall_score in range 0-100
Backend: mtf_confluence in valid range 1..len(timeframes)
Backend: done.total_found == count(result events)
Backend: segment=banknifty with 1d returns exactly 8 stocks, all with segment='banknifty'
Backend: No NaN/Infinity in SSE stream
Frontend: open-mtf-scanner (Multi-TF) button visible in AutoScanner header
Frontend: Clicking Multi-TF opens mtf-scanner-modal
Frontend: seg-filter-all, seg-filter-fo, seg-filter-index, seg-filter-banknifty, seg-filter-finnifty, seg-filter-midcap, seg-filter-cash all visible
Frontend: tf-toggle-15m (15 Min), tf-toggle-1h (1 Hour), tf-toggle-1d (Daily) all visible and togglable
Frontend: Deselecting TF works (class changes); cannot deselect all TFs (last TF stays selected)
Frontend: min-conf-1, min-conf-2, min-conf-3 buttons all visible
Frontend: Clicking start-mtf-scan with segment=index runs scan → button changes to 'Stop', progress bar updates, results appear
Frontend: Scan completes with toast 'Scan complete — 3 signals in 4 assets'; button changes to 'Re-Scan'
Frontend: mtf-download-csv button appears after scan completes
Frontend: mtf-dir-BUY, mtf-dir-SELL, mtf-dir-ALL direction filters work — BUY(1)+SELL(2)=ALL(3) ✓
Frontend: Clicking a result row closes modal AND loads chart (NIFTY loaded, toast confirmed)
Regression: open-stock-finder (Finder button) opens StockFinderModal — OK
Regression: scanner-toggle START→STOP→START cycle works correctly with selected stock
action_items: (Carry-over from iter_7) Fix pre-existing chart.addPriceLine TypeError in ChartPanel.
(Minor) MTF scanner 'full confluence' label in stats bar shows correctly per logic but could be renamed '3 aligned' to avoid confusion when only 1 TF is selected.
critical_code_review_comments: _TOTAL_STRATEGY_WEIGHT = 108 (not 100) because weights sum to 108, not 100. This is intentional as described in code. raw_score = weighted_sum/108*100 so max possible is ~100 — OK. But it means weights don't need to sum to 100, which is a non-obvious design choice worth documenting.

_mtf_scan_stock uses 1H TF with 30d period. For index tickers (^NSEI, ^NSEBANK, ^NSEMDCP50) Yahoo Finance sometimes returns empty data for 15m intraday on index symbols. The fallback to WAIT is graceful.
NIFTYNXT50.NS (4th index stock) returned None from _mtf_scan_stock (no result event emitted) — total_found=3 but total_scanned=4. This is handled correctly; backend skips None results.
_mtf_executor is module-level and never shut down on app shutdown — minor leak, same as _stock_finder_executor noted in iter_7.
Server.py file is 10,845 lines — well over 700-line guideline; strong recommendation to split into modules (auto_scan.py, mtf_scanner.py, stock_finder.py, strategies.py) for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weighted confluence + MTF scanner fully verified iteration_8. Backend test: /app/backend/tests/test_weighted_confluence_mtf_scanner.py (21 tests). Key observations: (1) index segment has exactly 4 stocks [^NSEI, ^NSEBANK, ^NSEMDCP50, NIFTYNXT50.NS]; NIFTYNXT50.NS may return None due to Yahoo Finance data gaps on that ticker. (2) banknifty segment has 8 stocks. (3) Weighted confluence score for HDFCBANK.NS = 20 (aligned=2, flat_would_be=18). (4) All modal testids present and working. Pre-existing issue: chart.addPriceLine TypeError (carry-over from iter_6/7).

rca_of_issues.NIFTYNXT50.NS no result: Yahoo Finance returns insufficient data for NIFTYNXT50.NS on some timeframes (especially 15m/1h intraday). _mtf_scan_stock returns None when current_price is None — handled gracefully by backend (not emitting result event). done.total_found correctly reflects only non-None results.
